Home / Lore / Factions / Cleaners

faction

Cleaners

A faction formed from sanitation workers and first responders who attempt to eradicate infection through fire.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Origin and doctrine

The Cleaners turn public-service backgrounds into an extreme containment ideology, treating fire as the answer to infection. [1]

Warlords reorganization

The faction survives the loss of its original leader and reappears in Lower Manhattan with new leadership and recruits. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Cleaners are former sanitation workers and first responders. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Their original leader Joe Ferro adopted fire as the faction's method for eliminating Green Poison. [1]

  3. confirmed

    By Warlords of New York, the Cleaners have regrouped with new recruits under Vivian Conley, one of Aaron Keener's lieutenants. [1]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • Lower Manhattanlocated at

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This page covers the official Warlords of New York faction recap and not every later seasonal change.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
